_schema: 6-beat structure per CLAUDE.md law 5. ALL text below is scratch placeholder awaiting Director wording (law 6).

intro.speaker: gus
intro.text: [Situation — Gus in a lawn chair among the wrecks. He watches you look. Says nothing first.]

options.text: [Mechanic option — name the one machine in the yard worth saving, and lowball him.]
options.label: [Mechanic]

haggle_success.speaker: gus
haggle_success.text: [Result — you priced it fair-for-you and he knows it. Respect, not offense. He'll hold the good stuff for you now.]

haggle_failure.speaker: gus
haggle_failure.text: [Good failure — you praised the wrong machine. He nods slow, files it away, and quotes you tourist prices from now on.]

browse.speaker: gus
browse.text: [Flavor — three words about new inventory. Gus doesn't do paragraphs.]
